digest.title: Jim Irons, Former Landsat Project Scientist, Wins Pecora Award
digest.tldr: Landsat’s Jim Irons won the prestigious William T.  Pecora Award.

digest.title: NASA’s CloudCube Pioneers Miniaturized Radar to Study Clouds, Precipitation

digest.title: The three hard-tech moonshots fueling SpaceX’s unbelievable IPO
digest.tldr: Most of the value in SpaceX's IPO is effectively a call option on the company's ambitious space data center plans.
